headline.vsl_adaptation: Scientists at the University of California just discovered why your hair stopped growing... and it has nothing to do with genetics

lead.opening_verbatim: Thousands are rushing to get a new hair restoration method based on surprising new studies from the University of California. It is the world's first and only hair loss solution that revives dead hair follicles. And studies confirm it helps men and women regrow a thick, full head of hair, even after years of balding.
lead.hook_mechanism: Social proof (thousands rushing) + university research + first-and-only claim
lead.transition_to_body: Now, with news of this breakthrough spreading like wildfire...

mechanism.mechanism_description: Hair loss is caused by stem cells in hair follicles dying and getting stuck in the telogen (shedding) phase. T-cells from the immune system are the only way to 'command' follicles to grow new hair. Re-Nourish revives these dead stem cells using T-cell activation to restart the three-phase hair growth cycle.
mechanism.expert_authority: Dr. Al Sears, nation's top anti-aging doctor, Sears Institute for Anti-Aging Medicine, Palm Beach, Florida
mechanism.mechanism_verbatim: The researchers discovered these T-cells are the only way to command hair follicles to grow new hair. More importantly, they showed that T-cells helped revive the stem cells in your hair follicles.

proof_elements.verbatim: surprising new studies from the University of California
nearly 70% of the women saw significant improvement in hair growth
Dr. Al Sears, the nation's top anti-aging doctor... Sears Institute for Anti-Aging Medicine in Palm Beach, Florida
the world's first and only hair loss solution that revives dead hair follicles

key_sections.content_verbatim: While genetics play a role, it's not the main reason you lose hair. And surprisingly it's not just your age, thyroid, hormones, stress, or a vitamin deficiency, either. The latest scientific research reveals that hair loss is primarily caused by the stem cells in your hair follicles dying.

Your hair grows in three phases: First, you have the anagen phase, the hair growing phase. Then the catagen phase, when hair gets ready to shed. And finally, the telogen phase, where your hair is pushed from the follicle and falls out. As you get older it becomes harder for your hair follicles to complete this three-phase cycle.

A study from the University of California finally found the answer. It has to do with T-cells - an important immune cell in your body. The researchers discovered these T-cells are the only way to command hair follicles to grow new hair. More importantly, they showed that T-cells helped revive the stem cells in your hair follicles - spurring new growth, filling in bald spots and natural hairline.

testimonials.quote: When my husband began to use this product, all he had on top of his head was fuzz. His hair began to grow after 30 days and now it is about 2 to 3 inches long!
testimonials.attribution: Jeanne F. from San Diego, CA

testimonials.quote: I have seen a significant improvement in hair growth. Previously, you could see thinning areas at the back of my head and now hair has grown over it.
My hair was thinning. So, I began to use Re-Nourish every day on the front part of my scalp. Now I have thicker hair.
testimonials.attribution: Susan D. from Fort Pierce, Florida

testimonials.quote: It's really mind-boggling that my hair started growing back.

clinical_studies.result: After 6 months, nearly 70% of the women saw significant improvement in hair growth. Their hair was noticeably fuller, thicker, and healthier looking. Most exciting of all, they grew new hair on parts of their scalp that had been bald for years.
After 12 weeks, they reported a staggering 74% increase in hair growth.
